summary: The implementation provides a comprehensive memory puzzle game platform with four puzzle types, game state tracking, and Internet Identity authentication. However, several requirements are missing or incomplete, and one major hallucination exists: the code retains legacy science notes functionality that was not requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement automatic progressive difficulty system that increases challenge after each completed level across all puzzle types
missing_requirements.reason: All game pages use hardcoded level=1, no automatic progression after completion

missing_requirements.requirement: Create level progress tracking system that shows player advancement through difficulty levels and unlocked puzzle types
missing_requirements.reason: Progress page displays basic stats but does not show per-puzzle-type level tracking or unlocked puzzles as specified in acceptance criteria
Backend has highScores map structure but no public functions to save or retrieve high scores beyond the generic completeLevel mutation

hallucinated_features.description: Science notes chapter system with Hindi content
hallucinated_features.reason: Backend contains ScienceNote type, initializeChapters function, and chapter query functions. Frontend has NotesPage, NoteCard components, i18n translations, and language selection features - none of which were requested in the BuildRequest
